versions.installHtml: # k0rdent includes the template for Azure out of the box
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get clustertemplate -n kcm-system
# NAME                            VALID
# azure-standalone-cp-1-0-23       true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: my-azure-clusterdeployment1
  namespace: kcm-system
  labels:
    group: demo
spec:
  template: azure-standalone-cp-1-0-23 # name of the clustertemplate
  credential: azure-cluster-identity-cred
  config:
    location: "AZURE_LOCATION" # Select your desired Azure Location
    subscriptionID: SUBSCRIPTION_ID_SUBSCRIPTION_ID # Enter the Subscription ID used earlier
    controlPlane:
      vmSize: Standard_A4_v2
    worker:
      vmSize: Standard_A4_v2
